stories.title: Who are the best wide receivers in the NFL? We ask...
stories.summary: Ja'Marr Chase or Justin Jefferson or someone else at No. 1? Which teams' WR1 and WR2 both made the top 10? See how NFL decision-makers stacked the position.

stories.title: Yzerman abruptly steps down as Red Wings GM
stories.summary: Steve Yzerman abruptly stepped down as general manager of the Red Wings on Wednesday.

stories.title: Cease, 10 AL relievers silence NL in 15-K shutout
stories.summary: Starting pitcher Dylan Cease combined with 10 relievers in a dominant three-hit, 15-strikeout shutout of the National League in a 4-0 win in Tuesday night's All-Star Game.

stories.title: Mbappé critical of tactics in loss by 'sloppy' Fra...
stories.summary: Kylian Mbappé seemed to question Didier Deschamps' approach and tactics after France's 2-0 defeat to Spain in the FIFA World Cup semifinal Tuesday.

stories.title: Fan fired for alleged racist message to Aces' Gray...
stories.summary: Hilton Grand Vacations said Tuesday that it has fired a man who allegedly sent a racist message to Aces guard Chelsea Gray on social media.
